architectural_purpose: deterministic coordination transition evaluation reasoning without transition execution

classification_semantics.blocked: governance, integrity, or execution-boundary policy blocks evaluation
classification_semantics.incomplete: required evaluation, continuity, provenance, compatibility, or explainability evidence is missing
classification_semantics.partially_successful: some evaluation guarantees pass while visible uncertainty remains
classification_semantics.prohibited: requested evaluation behavior violates hard non-execution boundaries
classification_semantics.successful: compatible transition relationship with all deterministic continuity present and no non-safe markers
classification_semantics.unknown: evaluation semantics cannot be deterministically interpreted
classification_semantics.unsuccessful: deterministic evaluation, compatibility, continuity, provenance, explainability, governance, or integrity findings fail
classification_semantics.unsupported: evaluation domain is outside supported deterministic scope
